editors_pick.title: Five Points in My Pain: How God’s Sovereignty Comforts Me
editors_pick.summary: When I used to travel extensively, I always packed my Bible reading plan. That way, even if I were thousands of miles from home, my husband, Ken, and I would be in sync on our daily readings. More than twenty years later, I can no longer travel, but Ken and I still make our annual journey from Ge...
